description: Maps (from_image:tag, baseline_image:tag) pairs to slim CycloneDX SBOMs of the baseline. Each entry records the engineer-specified compliance boundary: NGC (or other upstream) owns everything in the baseline; we own everything from_image adds on top. The captured SBOM is the BASELINE -- runtime licenses stages subtract its components from final-image NOTICES to filter out NGC-owned content. CI runs container/compliance/base_sboms/check_drift.py on every PR/post-merge; if either digest moved or the from_image's layer prefix no longer matches the recorded baseline, CI fails and a refresh PR is required.

entries.capture_note: ubuntu rootfs drift only (CUDA layers identical); delta-validation skipped, validated at runtime in CI

lmsysorg/sglang is built on this nvidia/cuda cudnn-devel base; re-baselined from the prior sglang@8df56b54 self-baseline so the framework stack over the clean CUDA+cuDNN floor is attributed. Delta-validation skipped at capture (the from-image's imageio-ffmpeg GPL pip binary is replaced in the runtime Dockerfile); validated at runtime in CI.
ubuntu rootfs drift only (CUDA layers identical); delta-validation skipped, validated at runtime in CI

lmsysorg/sglang is built on this nvidia/cuda cudnn-devel base; re-baselined from the prior sglang@8df56b54 self-baseline so the framework stack over the clean CUDA+cuDNN floor is attributed. Delta-validation skipped at capture (the from-image's imageio-ffmpeg GPL pip binary is replaced in the runtime Dockerfile); validated at runtime in CI.

entry_schema.baseline_digest: manifest-list digest of baseline_image at capture time
entry_schema.baseline_image: engineer-specified compliance floor (upstream owns below; we own above)
entry_schema.baseline_sbom: filename of the slim CycloneDX SBOM of the baseline in this directory
entry_schema.from_digest: manifest-list digest of from_image at capture time
entry_schema.from_image: registry-qualified image used in our Dockerfile's FROM line
entry_schema.layer_prefix_check_skipped: (optional) true if the engineer opted out at capture time
entry_schema.platform: platform pinned for layer-prefix verification, e.g. linux/amd64

format: CycloneDX 1.6 JSON, slim filter (drop properties/hashes/dependencies; keep evidence). Hard cap 5 MB per file.
